sheets.name: Demographics & Background
sheets.description: Start with what you know about your ideal customer.

fields.label: Persona Name
fields.hint: Give them a real name (e.g. 'Marketing Maria')

fields.label: Gender
fields.hint: If relevant to your product/service

fields.label: Location
fields.hint: City, region, or urban/suburban/rural

fields.label: Education Level
fields.hint: Highest degree or certification

fields.label: Job Title / Role
fields.hint: Their actual title or function

fields.label: Industry / Sector
fields.hint: e.g. SaaS, Retail, Healthcare, NGO

fields.label: Company Size
fields.hint: Startup, SMB, Enterprise, or employee count

fields.label: Income Range
fields.hint: If relevant — household or individual

fields.label: Family Status
fields.hint: Single, married, kids — if it affects decisions

sheets.name: Psychographics
sheets.description: This is where personas come alive — values, fears, and motivations.

fields.label: Core Values
fields.hint: What principles guide their decisions?

fields.label: Personality Traits
fields.hint: Analytical, creative, cautious, impulsive...

fields.label: Lifestyle Description
fields.hint: How do they spend their time outside work?
fields.placeholder: Describe their typical day or week...

fields.label: Attitudes Toward Technology
fields.hint: How quickly do they adopt new tools?

fields.label: Information Sources
fields.hint: Where do they learn? Podcasts, LinkedIn, blogs...

fields.label: Social Media Behavior
fields.hint: Lurker, commenter, creator, or absent?

fields.label: Professional Aspirations
fields.hint: Where do they want to be in 3-5 years?

fields.label: Personal Interests
fields.hint: Hobbies, passions, communities

fields.label: Influences & Role Models
fields.hint: Who do they look up to or follow?
fields.placeholder: e.g. Seth Godin, specific industry leaders

fields.label: Risk Tolerance
fields.hint: 1 = Very conservative, 5 = Risk-seeking

sheets.name: Goals & Challenges
sheets.description: What drives this person and what keeps them up at night.

fields.label: Primary Goal
fields.hint: The #1 thing they are trying to achieve

fields.label: Secondary Goals
fields.hint: Other important objectives

fields.label: Biggest Frustration
fields.hint: What is their biggest pain point right now?
fields.placeholder: e.g. Too many tools, not enough results

fields.label: Daily Challenges
fields.hint: Recurring problems they face at work

fields.label: What Keeps Them Up at Night
fields.hint: Their deepest professional worry

fields.label: What Would Make Their Life Easier
fields.hint: Their dream solution in one sentence
fields.placeholder: e.g. One platform that does it all

fields.label: What They Google at 2 AM
fields.hint: What questions are they secretly searching?

fields.label: Success Metric
fields.hint: How do they measure success in their role?

fields.label: Failure Fear
fields.hint: What outcome are they most afraid of?

fields.label: Unmet Need
fields.hint: What does nobody in the market solve for them?

sheets.name: Buying Journey
sheets.description: Map how this person discovers, evaluates, and buys solutions.

fields.label: Awareness Trigger
fields.hint: What event makes them realize they need a solution?

fields.label: Research Behavior
fields.hint: How do they evaluate options? Compare, demo, ask peers?

fields.label: Decision Criteria
fields.hint: Price, features, trust, speed, support, brand?
fields.placeholder: e.g. ROI proof, ease of use, integrations

fields.label: Key Objections
fields.hint: What would stop them from buying?

fields.label: Decision Timeline
fields.hint: How long does it take to decide?

fields.label: Decision Influencers
fields.hint: Who else is involved — boss, partner, team?

fields.label: Preferred Buying Channel
fields.hint: How do they prefer to purchase?

fields.label: Budget Authority
fields.hint: Do they control the budget?

fields.label: Competitor Alternatives
fields.hint: What else are they considering?

fields.label: Deal Breakers
fields.hint: What would make them walk away instantly?
fields.placeholder: e.g. No free trial, long contracts

sheets.name: Communication
sheets.description: How to reach and engage this persona effectively.

fields.label: Preferred Content Format
fields.hint: Blog, video, podcast, whitepaper, infographic...

fields.label: Preferred Channel
fields.hint: Email, LinkedIn, Instagram, in-person events...

fields.label: Tone That Resonates
fields.hint: What communication style works best?

fields.label: Messaging That Triggers Action
fields.hint: What would make them click or call?

fields.label: Content Turn-offs
fields.hint: What makes them unsubscribe or ignore?

fields.label: Email Frequency Tolerance
fields.hint: How often can you email them?

fields.label: Community Involvement
fields.hint: Forums, Slack groups, industry associations?

fields.label: Event Preferences
fields.hint: Webinars, conferences, workshops, meetups?

fields.label: Language / Jargon Level
fields.hint: How technical should your language be?

fields.label: Call to Action Style
fields.hint: Soft or direct?

sheets.name: Brand Relationship
sheets.description: Define how this persona relates to your brand.

fields.label: Current Awareness of Your Brand
fields.hint: Where are they in their relationship with you?

fields.label: First Impression
fields.hint: What would they think seeing your brand for the first time?
fields.placeholder: e.g. 'Looks professional but unclear what they do'

fields.label: What Would Make Them Trust You
fields.hint: Proof points: case studies, reviews, certifications?
fields.placeholder: List trust signals that matter to them...

fields.label: What Would Make Them Recommend You
fields.hint: When would they tell a colleague about you?

fields.label: Ideal Relationship With Your Brand
fields.hint: What type of relationship do they want?

fields.label: Quote That Captures This Persona
fields.hint: Write one sentence in their voice
fields.placeholder: "I just need something that works without a 6-month onboarding process."

fields.label: Photo or Avatar Description
fields.hint: Describe what this person looks like for your team
fields.placeholder: e.g. Professional woman, mid-30s, smart casual...

fields.label: Persona Created By
fields.hint: Your name and date
